metadata.title: IMPORT of 3 pets as Cargo in Chile

quoted_items.label: Import taxes
quoted_items.note: 35% of the CIF value will apply

quoted_items.label: Home delivery in Metro Santiago de Chile

descriptions.title: Customs clearance - SCL Airport
paragraphs: Includes our charges, our customs agent´s charges and SAG fees.
IMPORTANT: if clearance is outside normal working days and hours, we will need to add a surcharge.

descriptions.title: Import taxes
paragraphs: Chile taxes the import of pets. Total cost is approximately 35% over CIF value + commercial value of the 2nd and 3rd pet.

descriptions.title: Home delivery in Metro Santiago de Chile
paragraphs: Delivery of 3 pets to boarding facility in Santiago metro area.

notes.title: Comments
paragraphs: 1 -This price does not include cost of insurance of the animal.
2 -Prices charged by third parties may vary, in which case we will inform if there are
any variation in the customer´s charges.
3 - Payment: 100% in advance, 3 days prior to shipment.
